name: tyrekick
description: Open-source, zero-backend comment overlay for web prototypes. Feedback goes straight to a destination you own.
author: Richard, Frontier Operations Limited

scripts.size: node build.mjs && node -e "import('node:zlib').then(z=>import('node:fs').then(f=>{const b=f.readFileSync('dist/tyrekick.js');const g=z.gzipSync(b).length;console.log('tyrekick.js gzipped:',g,'bytes ('+(g/1024).toFixed(1)+' KB)');if(g>30720){console.error('FAIL: exceeds 30720 byte budget');process.exit(1)}console.log('OK: within 30 KB budget')}))"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
